# PRD Template

## Feature Name

State the feature name clearly.

## Problem

Describe the user problem and why it matters now.

## Goal

Describe the outcome the product should create.

## Non-Goals

List what the feature will not do in this iteration.

## Users And Scenarios

- Primary user
- Key scenario 1
- Key scenario 2
- Failure or edge scenario

## Scope

- Frontend changes
- Backend changes
- AI or extraction changes
- Data model changes

## Acceptance Criteria

- Criterion 1
- Criterion 2
- Criterion 3

## Risks And Open Questions

- Risk 1
- Open question 1

## Metrics

- Adoption metric
- Quality metric
- Operational metric
